initial_candidates.sql:
WITH yearly_max_points AS (
    SELECT 
        races.year,
        MAX(driver_points) + MAX(constructor_points) AS total_points
    FROM races
    JOIN results r1 ON races.race_id = r1.race_id
    JOIN (
        SELECT race_id, driver_id, SUM(points) AS driver_points
        FROM results
        GROUP BY race_id, driver_id
    ) max_driver ON r1.race_id = max_driver.race_id AND r1.driver_id = max_driver.driver_id
    JOIN (
        SELECT race_id, constructor_id, SUM(points) AS constructor_points
        FROM results
        GROUP BY race_id, constructor_id
    ) max_constructor ON r1.race_id = max_constructor.race_id AND r1.constructor_id = max_constructor.constructor_id
    GROUP BY races.year
)
SELECT year
FROM yearly_max_points
ORDER BY total_points ASC
LIMIT 3;

WITH yearly_max_points AS (
    SELECT 
        races.year,
        MAX(driver_points) AS max_driver_points,
        MAX(constructor_points) AS max_constructor_points
    FROM races
    JOIN results r ON races.race_id = r.race_id
    GROUP BY races.year
    HAVING MAX(driver_points) IS NOT NULL AND MAX(constructor_points) IS NOT NULL
),
driver_constructor_points_per_year AS (
    SELECT 
        races.year,
        r.driver_id,
        r.constructor_id,
        SUM(r.points) AS driver_points,
        SUM(r.points) AS constructor_points
    FROM races
    JOIN results r ON races.race_id = r.race_id
    GROUP BY races.year, r.driver_id, r.constructor_id
),
max_driver_points_per_year AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        MAX(driver_points) AS max_driver_points
    FROM driver_constructor_points_per_year
    GROUP BY year
),
max_constructor_points_per_year AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        MAX(constructor_points) AS max_constructor_points
    FROM driver_constructor_points_per_year
    GROUP BY year
),
combined_max_points AS (
    SELECT 
        d.year,
        d.max_driver_points + c.max_constructor_points AS total_points
    FROM max_driver_points_per_year d
    JOIN max_constructor_points_per_year c ON d.year = c.year
)
SELECT year
FROM combined_max_points
ORDER BY total_points ASC
LIMIT 3;

WITH yearly_max_points AS (
    SELECT 
        races.year,
        MAX(driver_points) AS max_driver_points,
        MAX(constructor_points) AS max_constructor_points
    FROM races
    JOIN results r1 ON races.race_id = r1.race_id
    JOIN (
        SELECT race_id, driver_id, SUM(points) AS driver_points
        FROM results
        GROUP BY race_id, driver_id
    ) d ON r1.race_id = d.race_id AND r1.driver_id = d.driver_id
    JOIN (
        SELECT race_id, constructor_id, SUM(points) AS constructor_points
        FROM results
        GROUP BY race_id, constructor_id
    ) c ON r1.race_id = c.race_id AND r1.constructor_id = c.constructor_id
    GROUP BY races.year
),
yearly_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        max_driver_points + max_constructor_points AS total_points
    FROM yearly_max_points
)
SELECT year
FROM yearly_totals
ORDER BY total_points ASC
LIMIT 3;

WITH yearly_max_points AS (
    SELECT 
        races.year,
        MAX(driver_points) AS max_driver_points,
        MAX(constructor_points) AS max_constructor_points
    FROM races
    JOIN results ON races.race_id = races.race_id
    GROUP BY races.year
),
driver_yearly_points AS (
    SELECT 
        races.year,
        results.driver_id,
        SUM(results.points) AS driver_points
    FROM races
    JOIN results ON races.race_id = races.race_id
    GROUP BY races.year, results.driver_id
),
constructor_yearly_points AS (
    SELECT 
        races.year,
        results.constructor_id,
        SUM(results.points) AS constructor_points
    FROM races
    JOIN results ON races.race_id = races.race_id
    GROUP BY races.year, results.constructor_id
),
yearly_max AS (
    SELECT 
        d.year,
        MAX(d.driver_points) AS max_driver_points,
        MAX(c.constructor_points) AS max_constructor_points
    FROM driver_yearly_points d
    JOIN constructor_yearly_points c ON d.year = c.year
    GROUP BY d.year
)
SELECT 
    year,
    max_driver_points + max_constructor_points AS total_points
FROM yearly_max
ORDER BY total_points ASC
LIMIT 3;

WITH yearly_max_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        MAX(driver_points) + MAX(constructor_points) AS total_points
    FROM races r
    JOIN (
        SELECT race_id, driver_id, SUM(points) AS driver_points
        FROM results
        GROUP BY race_id, driver_id
    ) dp ON r.race_id = dp.race_id
    JOIN (
        SELECT race_id, constructor_id, SUM(points) AS constructor_points
        FROM results
        GROUP BY race_id, constructor_id
    ) cp ON r.race_id = cp.race_id AND dp.race_id = cp.race_id
    GROUP BY r.year
)
SELECT year
FROM yearly_max_points
ORDER BY total_points ASC
LIMIT 3;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH yearly_max_points AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        MAX(driver_points) + MAX(constructor_points) AS total_points
    FROM races r
    JOIN (
        SELECT race_id, driver_id, SUM(points) AS driver_points
        FROM results
        GROUP BY race_id, driver_id
    ) dp ON r.race_id = dp.race_id
    JOIN (
        SELECT race_id, constructor_id, SUM(points) AS constructor_points
        FROM results
        GROUP BY race_id, constructor_id
    ) cp ON r.race_id = cp.race_id AND dp.race_id = cp.race_id
    GROUP BY r.year
)
SELECT year
FROM yearly_max_points
ORDER BY total_points ASC
LIMIT 3;
